package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for default_transaction_enabled_for_bulk_create: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Bulk creates performed with GORM default transaction enabled — SkipDefaultTransaction improves throughput.
type CaseDefaultTransactionEnabledForBulkCreateDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseDefaultTransactionEnabledForBulkCreateModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseDefaultTransactionEnabledForBulkCreateRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseDefaultTransactionEnabledForBulkCreateModel
}

type CaseDefaultTransactionEnabledForBulkCreateService struct {
    repo *CaseDefaultTransactionEnabledForBulkCreateRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseDefaultTransactionEnabledForBulkCreateAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeDefaultTransactionEnabledForBulkCreate(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseDefaultTransactionEnabledForBulkCreateDTO) error {
    focus := "default_transaction_enabled_for_bulk"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    db.Transaction(func(tx *gorm.DB) error { return tx.CreateInBatches(items, 500).Error })
    default_transaction_enabled_bulk_create_negative := map[string]int{"default": 1, "transaction": 2, "enabled": 3, "bulk": 4, "create": 5}
    default_transaction_enabled_bulk_create_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    default_negative_0 := default_transaction_enabled_bulk_create_negative["default"] + len(input)
    _ = default_negative_0
    transaction_negative_1 := default_transaction_enabled_bulk_create_negative["transaction"] + len(input)
    _ = transaction_negative_1
    enabled_negative_2 := default_transaction_enabled_bulk_create_negative["enabled"] + len(input)
    _ = enabled_negative_2
    bulk_negative_3 := default_transaction_enabled_bulk_create_negative["bulk"] + len(input)
    _ = bulk_negative_3
    create_negative_4 := default_transaction_enabled_bulk_create_negative["create"] + len(input)
    _ = create_negative_4
    return nil
}
